home.heroSubtitle: Upscale, denoise, and revive old photos — entirely in your browser, no data leaves your device.
home.dropHint: Drop an image here or click to select
home.dropHintFormats: PNG, JPG, WEBP up to 32 MB

features.upscaleDesc: Real-ESRGAN AI upscaling preserving fine details
features.faceRestoreDesc: GFPGAN / CodeFormer for sharp portrait faces
features.denoiseDesc: SCUNet blind denoising without losing sharpness
features.privacyDesc: All processing happens locally — nothing is uploaded

empty.title: No image loaded
empty.description: Drop an image or go back to Home to upload one

about.title: About PhotoRestore Web
about.description: PhotoRestore Web is an open-source project that brings AI photo restoration to the browser using ONNX Runtime Web with WebGPU acceleration.

privacy.title: Privacy Guarantee
privacy.description: All ML inference runs 100% client-side. Your images are never uploaded to any server.

models.title: Models & Licenses
models.description: PhotoRestore Web uses publicly available ONNX models. See the MODELS.md document for full details on sources and licenses.

errors.oom: Out of memory — try a smaller image or tile size
errors.webgpuUnavailable: WebGPU is not available in this browser, falling back to WASM

models.realesrgan-x4plus-anime: Real-ESRGAN x4plus Anime — optimized for anime and illustrations
models.cugan-up4x-denoise: Real-CUGAN Up×4 Denoise — upscale with denoising
models.gfpgan-v1.4: GFPGAN v1.4 — face restoration with generative prior
models.codeformer: CodeFormer — robust face restoration with fidelity control
models.lama: LaMa — large mask inpainting with Fourier convolutions
models.scunet: SCUNet — blind image denoising without sacrificing sharpness
